case_title: BERONIO LUMBER COMPANY vs. ARCHITECTURAL MILL-PRODUCTS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DIRECTING SERVICE OF SUMMONS ON DEFT ARCHITECTURAL MILL- PRODUCTS, INC. BY DELIVERY OF PROCESS TO SECRETARY OF STATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERONIO LUMBER COMPANY SERVED SEP-17-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHITECTURAL MILL-PRODUCTS, INC.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-23-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $127.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERONIO LUMBER COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHITECTURAL MILL-PRODUCTS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERONIO LUMBER COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCHITECTURAL MILL-PRODUCTS, INC. $4,522.35 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $127.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,449.85

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHITECTURAL MILL-PRODUCTS, INC.
